blazemeter-debugger.name: BlazeMeter Step-by-step Debugger
blazemeter-debugger.description: This plugin enables step-by-step debugging of JMeter scripts

0.4.changes: Fixed bugs on not evaluating variables

0.5.changes:
- Add last sampler result tab;

- Choose TG from context of tree;

- Fixed italic font in tree not shown on Mac;

- Fixed blue color for current element is blue-on-blue for Mac;

- Fixed logging lab for old jmeter versions;

- Fixed clear data in info tabs and listeners;

- Fixed modification thread groups;

jpgc-directory-listing.name: Directory Listing Config
jpgc-directory-listing.description: Directory listing config allows to set file path from source directory into jmeter-variable

0.2.changes:
Fixed resolve JMeter variables for Destination Variable name

Fix relative path

0.3.changes:
Fixed synchronize access to underlying iterator

Allow copying Directory Listing Config elements in GUI

bzm-random-csv.name: Random CSV Data Set
bzm-random-csv.description: Config item that allows reading CSV files in random order

0.4.changes: optimize performance, fix empty lines processing, fix browse button dialog

0.8.changes: fix nulll point exception when independent list

bzm-parallel.name: Parallel Controller & Sampler
bzm-parallel.description: Parallel Controller makes all of its children to run in parallel to each other

0.2.changes: Fixed class name clash with Debugger plugin

0.4.changes: Fixed reset Thread Context in all AbstractTestElements

0.5.changes: Fixed Concurrency Modification exception for Config elements

0.9.changes: Fixed Test Actions (Start Next Thread Loop, Stop Thread, Stop All Threads)

0.10.changes: Add ability to limit the number of thread to start to simulate browser's real threading

jpgc-rotating-listener.name: Rotating JTL Listener
jpgc-rotating-listener.description: Rotating listener provides writing sequence of files, limited by number of samples per file.

0.2.changes: Fixed file naming when file hasn't extension

jpgc-sense.name: BlazeMeter Uploader
jpgc-sense.description: This is special plugin in for uploading results to BlazeMeter/BlazeMeter Sense during test running or immediately after test end

jpgc-wsc.name: Weighted Switch Controller
jpgc-wsc.description: This controller takes the information about child elements and offers managing relative weights for them.

0.2.changes:
Fixed samples generation in nested controllers(Transaction, Simple, Weighted Switch);

- Fixed samples generation with disabled subgroups;

- Added effect of disabled subgroups in GUI;

- Added a ban on changing the column 'Name' and the disabled subgroup in GUI

0.4.changes:
Fixed samples generation in transaction controllers

Fixed styles for JMeter Darcula

0.5.changes:
Fixed samples generation in transaction controllers (all nested levels)

Fixed samples generation with disabled subgroups

1.5.1.changes: Added support for 'from mode' option in XMPP Connection

bzm-hls.name: BlazeMeter - HLS Plugin
bzm-hls.description: HLS protocol sampler, enabling testing for streaming applications

1.3.changes:
Plugin name has been changed to continue with the convention of BlazeMeter plugins.
Logo has been added.
Issue in live stream when it did not show results in View Results Tree has been fixed.

2.0.changes: Major new release with a lot of bug fixes and new features (simplified UI, granular assertions, etc). Please check the readme

3.0.changes: Major new release with support for MPEG DASH and new features (like automatic protocol recognition, sampler renaming, etc). Please check the readme

3.0.1.changes: Patch fix for playlist reload timing and behaviour for interrupted tests

3.0.2.changes: Patch fix for equals signs on URIs, subtitles better handled

3.0.3.changes: Patch fix master-slave tests & URL protocol recognition improved

3.1.changes: Improved protocol recognition and fixed minor dash issues

bzm-http2-legacy.name: BlazeMeter - HTTP/2 Legacy Plugin
bzm-http2-legacy.description: This is a deprecated HTTP/2 plugin which allows to test the HTTP2 protocol in java 8 (Recommended to migrate to v2.0 or higher)

1.1.changes: Fix memory leak and JTL output error

1.2.changes: Fix HTTP2 plugin POST support to include proper request and fix issue with callback handler

1.3.changes: Added support for standards JMeter listeners and partial support for push promise

1.4.changes: Fixed serialization issue for JMeter distributed mode

1.4.1.changes: Fix issue handling http responses without body (like 204 status code)

1.5.changes: Request methods PATCH & DELETE were added. Also support for no SSL connections and libraries updated.

1.6.changes: Added support for Gzip in response headers and added data frame to PUT method

2.0.changes: Major release using as baseline Java 11 and Jetty 11, proxy support and many other new functionalities!

2.0.1.changes: Fixed NPE issues with resources took too long to answer

2.0.2.changes: Improvements in performance, memory usage and connections

2.0.3.changes: Added support for HTTP 1.x, ALPN, multiplexing, and parallel execution. Also improvements in performance, memory and connection usage

2.0.5.changes: Fixes around iteration support in Thread Group and Loop Controllers, fixes in embedded resources, and better support for HTTP/1.

bzm-rte.name: BlazeMeter - RTE Plugin
bzm-rte.description: Support for RTE (remote terminal emulation), providing a recorder, sampler and config element to interact with remote terminal servers

1.0.3.changes: Fix TN5250 protocol keys mapping for F13-F24, roll down and roll up keys

1.0.4.changes: Allow sending text to TN3230 server when screen has no defined fields

1.1.changes: Support for setting fields by label and update dm3270 which includes tn3270 protocol enhancements support improvements (SSCP LU DATA, BID) and additional fixes (hiding invisible fields from screen and sending some fields back to server)

1.1.1.changes: This version fixes property naming for inputs by label feature

2.0.changes: New rte recorder test element added and a many fixes!

2.1.changes: New recorder features allowing to record input by label, wait for text and assertions

2.1.1.changes: Fix bug originated in version 2.0 which could not allow user to insert empty inputs.

2.2.changes: Extractor post-processor added, hide credentials and sampler naming while recording!

2.2.1.changes: Wait conditions behaviour changed and some reported issues fixed

3.0.1.changes: Fix issue with no screen interaction after sample naming

3.1.changes: Send attention key to a determined position, and some bug fix!

3.1.1.changes: Fix various issues regarding input by tab, input by label, screen painting, and added support for ALP charset

3.2.changes: Wait for disconnect support in RTESampler and automatic detection by RTERecorder

3.2.1.changes: Circular field support, alarm for VT420 and many bug fixes!

3.2.2.changes: Add support to continue on unknown terminal command on TN3270

3.3.changes: Changed the behavior of the VT protocol to avoid waiting for server response in each character sent

bzm-siebel.name: BlazeMeter - Auto Correlation Recorder Plugin
bzm-siebel.description: Auto Correlation Recorder provides automatic correlation and detection of variables at recording time

1.0.changes: Siebel Plugin has evolved into Correlation Recorder with lots of new features. Please check documentation to learn about all the new goodies!

1.1.changes: Improvement in ui, documentation and new functionalities for Correlation Extractor and Replacements

1.1.1.changes: Fixed issue with duplicated rules with disable them

1.1.2.changes: Fixed issue that removed equals sign from request body

1.2.2.changes: Provided some minor fixes and tweaks for the Regex Extractors, UI behaviors and Correlation Repositories.

1.2.3.changes: Improved compatibility with new versions of JMeter and with MS Windows.

2.0.changes: Added support for automatic correlations and rules analysis, alongside general improvements.

2.0.1.changes: Fixed a UI update lock issue.

2.0.2.changes: Minor fixes and improvements in rule export.

2.1.changes: Improvements and fixes, as well as integration with the BlazeMeter correlation rules repository.

2.2.changes: Improvements and fixes, as well saving of rules to remote repositories was also incorporate.d

2.4.changes: JSON Extractor and Replacement analysis and legacy support and bug fixes

2.5.changes: JSON Extractor and Replacement support on automatic comparison and variable detection

2.5.1.changes: Draft template feature and performance improvements

3.0.changes: Siebel components removed and many bug fixes!

3.1.changes: Many improvements in generation of suggestions from templates!

bzm-repositories.name: BlazeMeter - Repositories
bzm-repositories.description: BlazeMeter repositories functionality for the Auto Correlation Recorder Plugin

mqmeter.name: IBM MQ Support
mqmeter.description: A JMeter Plugin to put and get message on IBM MQ Queue, also publish message on Topic. It connect to MQ Server through server channel using ip address, port number, userID and password (if the channel has CHLAUTH rules).

bzm-jmeter-citrix-plugin.name: BlazeMeter - Citrix Plugin
bzm-jmeter-citrix-plugin.description: Support for Citrix protocol (only available for Microsoft Windows)

jmeter-core.name: jmeter - Core
jmeter-core.description: Core functionality for JMeter, including GUI and engine.

jmeter-tcp.name: jmeter - TCP Protocol Support
jmeter-tcp.description: The TCP Sampler opens a TCP/IP connection to the specified server. It then sends the text, and waits for a response.

jmeter-ldap.name: jmeter - LDAP Protocol Support
jmeter-ldap.description: This Sampler lets you send a different Ldap request(Add, Modify, Delete and Search) to an LDAP server.

jmeter-native.name: jmeter - OS Process Support
jmeter-native.description: The OS Process Sampler is a sampler that can be used to execute commands on the local machine.

jmeter-mail.name: jmeter - Mail/SMTP Support
jmeter-mail.description: The SMTP Sampler can send mail messages using SMTP/SMTPS protocol.

jmeter-junit.name: jmeter - JUnit Support
jmeter-junit.description: Executes JUnit tests compiled into JARs

jmeter-jms.name: jmeter - JMS Support
jmeter-jms.description: Offers JMS Subscriber, Publisher and JMS P2P

jmeter-jdbc.name: jmeter - JDBC Support
jmeter-jdbc.description: This sampler lets you send an JDBC Request (an SQL query) to a database.

jmeter-ftp.name: jmeter - FTP Protocol Support
jmeter-ftp.description: This controller lets you send an FTP 'retrieve file' or 'upload file' request to an FTP server.

jmeter-http.name: jmeter - HTTP Protocol Support
jmeter-http.description: This sampler lets you send an HTTP/HTTPS request to a web server.

jmeter-components.name: jmeter - Various Core Components
jmeter-components.description: Ships a lot of various components for JMeter, including Debug Sampler

jpgc-graphs-composite.name: Composite Timeline Graph
jpgc-graphs-composite.description: Graph that is able to show several other graphs data in single place

2.1.changes: New chart: Response Times Percentiles Over Time

jpgc-graphs-vs.name: KPI vs KPI Graphs
jpgc-graphs-vs.description:
• Hits/s vs Active Threads
  • Avg Response Time vs Active Threads

jpgc-autostop.name: Auto-Stop Listener
jpgc-autostop.description: Ability to stop test based on runtime KPIs

0.2.changes: added environment variable setting when auto-stopped

0.3.changes: added autostop criteria based on response time percentile

jpgc-casutg.name: Custom Thread Groups
jpgc-casutg.description:
Adds new Thread Groups:
  • Stepping Thread Group
  • Ultimate Thread Group
  • Concurrency Thread Group
  • Arrivals Thread Group
  • Free-Form Arrivals Thread Group

2.9.changes: Support JMeter's way of prefixing threads for distributed testing

2.10.changes: Remove deprecation flag from Stepping Thread Group

3.0.changes: Support for 'Same User On Each Iteration' on ConcurrencyThreadGroup, ArrivalsThreadGroup and FreeFormArrivalsThreadGroup

3.1.changes: IteratingController support for built-in iteration variable support in JMeter 5.2+

3.1.1.changes: Minor fix related to IteratingController support and reported starting index

jpgc-csl.name: Console Status Logger
jpgc-csl.description: Small listener that prints each second a line with runtime stats into console

jpgc-csvars.name: Variables from CSV File
jpgc-csvars.description: Config item to load one-line CSV file into JMeter variables on startup. Helps to have external configuration file for test plan.

jpgc-dbmon.name: DBMon Sample Collector
jpgc-dbmon.description: DbMon lets you plot performance counters accessible via SQL when the test is running.

jpgc-dummy.name: Dummy Sampler
jpgc-dummy.description: Debugging sampler that just generates result as you specified. Very convenient to debug your complex scripts

jpgc-ffw.name: Flexible File Writer
jpgc-ffw.description: Flexible File Writer plugin allows writing test results in flexible format, specified via GUI.

jpgc-fifo.name: Inter-Thread Communication
jpgc-fifo.description: Global string queues for inter-thread communication

jpgc-functions.name: Custom JMeter Functions
jpgc-functions.description: A number of additional JMeter functions that cover more of typical needs.

jpgc-httpraw.name: HTTP Raw Request
jpgc-httpraw.description: Low-level HTTP request, solves memory problem for huge file upload/download case. Also ships Raw Data Source preprocessor.

jpgc-jms.name: JMS Send and Receive Sampler
jpgc-jms.description: If you are using JMS (Java Message Service) to send and receive messages between two or more clients, we have created a sampler which enables you to send and receive messages.

jpgc-jmxmon.name: JMXMon Sample Collector
jpgc-jmxmon.description: JMXMon lets you plot JMX performance metrics over time when the test is running.

0.3.changes: Local JVM connection option (for JMeter self-monitoring)

jpgc-json.name: JSON/YAML Plugins (deprecated)
jpgc-json.description: [Deprecated in favor of core JMeter 4.0+] Allows extracting values from JSON/YAML responses using JSONPath syntax. Also ships JSONPath Assertion.

2.6.changes: Fix case of asserting array against array

2.7.changes: Added YAML path extractor and assertion

jpgc-lockfile.name: Lock File Config
jpgc-lockfile.description: Lock file allows you to set locks to prevent multiple JMeters from running on the same machine

jpgc-oauth.name: OAuth Sampler (Deprecated)
jpgc-oauth.description: Does not work with JMeter v3.2+. OAuth sampler is an extended REST sampler which in addition includes the properties needed for this authorization

jpgc-perfmon.name: PerfMon (Servers Performance Monitoring)
jpgc-perfmon.description: Allows collecting target server resource metrics. You need to start ServerAgent on a target machine.

jpgc-prmctl.name: Parameterized Controller & Set Variables Action
jpgc-prmctl.description: A controller and sampler to help reuse modules with variables in the scope

jpgc-redis.name: Redis Data Set
jpgc-redis.description: Allows reading test data from Redis storage

0.3.changes: fixed exception when RANDOM_KEEP chosen on a list

0.5.changes: fixed ssl config in redis dataset so it actually gets used

jpgc-tst.name: Throughput Shaping Timer
jpgc-tst.description: A plugin to set desired hits/s (RPS) schedule

2.5.changes: Fix negative values from TSTFeedback function

2.6.changes: Added support for multiple load_profile properties

jpgc-udp.name: UDP Protocol Support
jpgc-udp.description: This plugin adds UDP protocol support to JMeter. With this plugin you can load test DNS, NTP, TFTP, Boot servers and many-many other systems.

jpgc-webdriver.name: Selenium/WebDriver Support
jpgc-webdriver.description: This plugin allows testing real browser behavior at UI level using Selenium/WebDriver technology

2.3.changes: Add vars, props and ctx to Sampler

4.6.0.changes: UI Refactoring and upgrade to Selenium 4.6.0

4.7.2.changes: Addition of driver for Edge and upgrade to Selenium 4.7.2

4.8.1.changes: Upgrade to Selenium 4.8.1 and UI bug fix in Proxy settings for Firefox.

4.8.3.1.changes: New tab to customise browser extensions and upgrade to Selenium 4.8.3.

4.8.3.2.changes: Support of Java 1.8 for Capabilities Management tab.

4.13.0.0.changes: Update to Selenium 4.13.0: last version of WebDriver with Java 8 support.

4.13.0.1.changes: Make FTP and SOCKS proxies optional, set startTime in more situations

4.13.0.2.changes: Update of WebDriver Sampler default code (startTime & endTime calls commented out).

jpgc-esa.name: Extractor Success Assertion
jpgc-esa.description: Assertion to check that extractor were successfull

jpgc-standard.name: jpgc - Standard Set
jpgc-standard.description: Virtual package, select to install its dependencies

jpgc-cmd.name: Command-Line Graph Plotting Tool
jpgc-cmd.description: There is small command-line utility for generating graphs out of JTL files. It behave just like right-click context menu on all graphs. The tool can generate PNG, CSV or both. Note you can use GraphsGeneratorListener if you want to bulk generate graphs after a test or for existing results.

2.2.changes: Fixed logging for JMeter since v3.2

jpgc-filterresults.name: Filter Results Tool
jpgc-filterresults.description: Often it's necessary to filter the results of a test to obtain a global vision with pages without all the urls that are declared in the html page.

2.2.changes: Fixed logging for JMeter since v3.2

jpgc-ggl.name: Graphs Generator Listener
jpgc-ggl.description: Graphs Generator Listener generates several graphs at end of test

jpgc-mergeresults.name: Merge Results
jpgc-mergeresults.description: Merge Results is a tool to merge files of results (to simplify the comparison of two or more load tests).

jpgc-pde.name: Page Data Extractor
jpgc-pde.description: This graph will plot data extracted from page results (status, health pages, etc.).

jpgc-plancheck.name: Test Plan Check Tool
jpgc-plancheck.description: Small command line tool to check test plan consistency. Helps in automation of JMeter executions.

2.2.changes: Fixed working plugin with JMeter v3.2

2.3.changes: Fixed logging for JMeter since v3.2

jpgc-synthesis.name: Synthesis Report
jpgc-synthesis.description: Synthesis Report is a mix between Summary Report and Aggregate Report

2.2.changes: Fixed Configuration Percentiles in Aggregate Report. Fixed Labels in csv reports

jpgc-sts.name: HTTP Simple Table Server
jpgc-sts.description: The main idea is to use a tiny http server in JMeter Plugins to manage the dataset files with simple commands to get / add / find rows of data in files.

3.1.changes: Replace beanshell with groovy script : jsr223.init.file=simple-table-server.groovy. New features : Could load files when STS startup, Set charset to read or write file and in http header response, Add CONFIG command, add daemon mode for linux nohup, SAVE command add ADD_TIMESTAMP parameter

4.0.changes: Add command FIND, find a string in the file, FIND_MODE=SUBSTRING (Default), EQUALS, REGEX_FIND, REGEX_MATCH

5.0.changes: Add command READMULTI, Read multi lines in one request, parameter NB_LINES : number of lines to read

jpgc-plugins-manager.name: Plugins Manager
jpgc-plugins-manager.description: Adds menu item into Options menu to access UI for installing/removing additional plugins

1.6.changes: Changes to support JMeter 5.4 deprecation of old loggers

1.7.changes: Fix couple of security issues, including Log4Shell

1.8.changes: Use headless mode in BAT file for Windows

1.9.changes: Fix issue of 1.8 of libs saved into wrond directory

1.11.changes: Fix one CVE via beanutils, bump up to Java 1.8

1.12.changes: Fix canUninstall flag bypass in DependencyResolver, fix Log4j CVE

io.github.sagaraggarwal86-configurable-a.name: JAAR — JTL AI Analysis & Reporting
io.github.sagaraggarwal86-configurable-a.description: A file-based Apache JMeter listener plugin for post-test JTL analysis. Provides a filterable aggregate table with features like Filter Results using Start/End Offset & Transaction Names with RegEx support, Dynamic Percentile & Table Columns, SLA Threshold Highlighting, CLI Headless Mode, Chart Interval Control, AI-Analyzed HTML Performance Report, Export AI Report in Excel Format — with zero runtime overhead.

5.0.1.changes: fixed marker class and component class, removed old deprecated versions and kept only relevant meaningful version

1.2.0.changes: Configurable pseudo TTY allocation; bug fixes

mqtt-xmeter.name: MQTT Protocol Samplers
mqtt-xmeter.description: connect, publish, subscribe and disconnect samplers

1.3.3.changes: Sampler now supports Header/Cookie/Auth Manager, reports response headers, and handles binary attachments.

tilln-cors-plugin.name: CORS Pre-Processor
tilln-cors-plugin.description: CORS Pre-Processor makes preflight requests for cross-origin HTTP requests if required, based on request method and headers, and mimics a browser's preflight cache to avoid unnecessary requests.

tilln-formman.name: HTTP Form Manager
tilln-formman.description:
This plugin makes JMeter behave a little more like a browser: form fields are automatically populated with preselected values.
  • No more manual correlation of hidden inputs, such as session variables.
  • Just correlate parameters that actually relate to user input.

tilln-iso8583.name: ISO-8583 Sampler
tilln-iso8583.description:
Generate ISO-8583 financial transactions for testing of payment gateways and switches
With support for cryptogram calculation (PIN Block, MAC, ARQC)
Based on the jPOS framework

1.1.changes:
• Upgrade to jPOS v2.1.4
  • Fire-and-forget messages
  • Non-persistent Channel option
  • Advanced Mux options to configure response/request matching
  • Non-message related cryptographic functions
  • Packager logging
  • Multiple success response codes
  • ARQC transaction data overriding, custom padding, and automatic CVR extraction
  • Bug fixes: #2
  • Incompatible changes:
    • ISO8583 Crypto PreProcessor: Transaction Data field now overrides the ARQC input instead of appending
    • ISO8583 Config: renamed to ISO8583 Connection Configuration

1.2.changes:
• Upgrade to jPOS v2.1.6
  • Round-robin selection for multiple connections in server mode
  • Optional reference ID for explicitly linking Sampler to Connection Config
  • Request Listener script option to handle incoming messages (0800 network management)
  • Bug fixes: #30, #32

1.3.changes:
• Upgrade to jPOS v2.1.8
  • Bug fixes: #24
  • Incompatible changes:
    • ISO8583 Config: Request Listener script now Groovy instead of BeanShell
    • ISO8583 Crypto PreProcessor: Removed some ARQC settings that are now derived automatically from Issuer Application Data (Session Key Derivation Method, jmeter.iso8583.arqcInputTags, jmeter.iso8583.arqcFromFullIADForCVNs)

1.4.changes:
• Upgrade to jPOS v2.1.10
  • Automatic ARQC padding
  • Bug fixes: #77

tilln-junit.name: JUnit Reporter
tilln-junit.description:
Generates CI/CD-compatible JUnit Reports in XML format based on custom KPIs: Comparing aggregate metrics with threshold values determines pass/fail.
Supports filtering of sample labels by regular expressions.
Supported aggregates:
  • Response time percentiles (any)
  • Maximum and minimum response time
  • Response time average and standard deviation
  • Sample error rate
  • Total number of samples
  • Custom metrics

tilln-retrier.name: Sample Retrier
tilln-retrier.description:
Post-Processor that retries failed samplers based on sample results (regex match of response code, data, headers or message).
  • Configurable pause and back-off behaviour
  • Handles "Retry-After" HTTP headers
  • Retries as represented as sub-results
Does not take into account any assertion results.

tilln-sshmon.name: SSHMon Sample Collector
tilln-sshmon.description: Monitoring plugin for agentless collection and plotting of remote server metrics via SSH connections

1.2.changes: Bug fixes and new locale config option.

1.3.changes:
• Replaced ssh client library JSch with Apache Mina SSHD
  • ProxyJump support
  • Bug fixes

1.4.changes: Maintenance release: Dependency updates and bug fixes

tilln-wssecurity.name: WS Security for SOAP
tilln-wssecurity.description: Digital signature, encryption, decryption, timestamp and username token for SOAP messages via Pre/Post-Processors that modify sampler payloads/responses.

1.4.changes: Added support for decryption of response messages

1.5.changes: Added WSS Timestamp Pre-Processor. Added WSS UsernameToken timestamp precision option and 'no password' option.

1.6.changes:
• Support for signing/encrypting/decrypting attachments
  • Upgrade to wss4j v2.2
  • Support for TCP Sampler, SMTP Sampler
  • New options:
    • Header: Actor, mustUnderstand
    • Parts to Sign/Encrypt: ID
  • Removed options:
    • Signature algorithm http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmldsig-more#rsa-ripemd160
    • Digest algorithm http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#ripemd160
    • Key encryption algorithm http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#rsa-oaep-mgf1p

1.7.changes:
• SOAP Message Signer: Support for symmetric signature (HMAC)
  • SOAP Message Decrypter: Support for multiple decryption keys
  • Default keystore type is now JCEKS (compatible with JKS and PKCS12)
  • Bug fixes
  • Incompatible changes:
    • SOAP Message Decrypter: Private Key Password field removed (use Credentials table instead)

1.8.changes:
• Upgrade to wss4j v2.3.1
  • Configurable keystore type (JCEKS/JKS/PKCS12)
  • Bug fixes

1.9.changes: Maintenance release: Upgrade to wss4j v3.0.0

jpgc-hadoop.name: Hadoop/HBase Testing
jpgc-hadoop.description:
• HBase Connection Config
  • HDFS Operations
  • Hadoop Job Tracker Sampler
  • HBase CRUD Sampler
  • HBase Scan Sampler
  • HBase Rowkey Sampler

websocket-samplers.name: WebSocket Samplers by Peter Doornbosch
websocket-samplers.description: Provides 6 samplers for load testing WebSocket applications. Use the WebSocket request-response sampler for testing a basic request-response flow (the most common case), or combine the other samplers to support a more sophisticated WebSocket test scenario.

0.9.changes: Single read sampler can be made optional, which avoids the sampler to fail when no websocket frame is received; this is useful in test scenario's where you can not exactly predict the server's behavior.

0.10.changes: New feature: frame filters. To handle situations in which the server sends unsolicited messages and the occurrence of such messages is hard to predict or otherwise hard to take into account in the test plan, filters can be used to discard such messages before they are seen by a sampler.

0.11.1.changes: New feature: you can control what's happening with the websocket connections at the end of the test: leave open (default), close on websocket level or close on tcp level, by setting JMeter property websocket.thread.stop.policy. Fix: all result viewers will now correctly show the size of received bytes. Frame payload is counted as 'body', frame headers as 'headers'. By default, filtered frames do not contribute to 'received size', but this can be changed by setting JMeter property websocket.result.size_includes_filtered_frames.

1.0.changes: New feature: registers size of sent messages too. Requires JMeter version 3.1 or later!

1.1.changes: Ready for / compatible with JMeter 4. New feature: send unsolicited pong.

1.2.changes: Improved ping/pong filtering and added option to read (binary) payload data from file

1.2.2.changes: Improved memory usage for receiving binary messages

1.2.7.changes: Fixed bug about not always correctly reading frame under heavy load in combination with short read timeouts, and some other minor bug fixes.

1.2.8.changes: Added option to Single Read Sampler to read Text OR Binary, whatever is received.

1.2.9.changes: Increased max read timeout; added data type for simplifying handling STOMP protocol messages.

1.2.10.changes: Merge header managers when present, use Java 8 as before.

1.3.changes: Added support for deflate/uncompress websocket messages (RFC 7692).

1.3.1.changes: Fixed bug (ClassCastException when reading unexpected frame in request-response sampler)

1.3.2.changes: Fixed bug (memory leak due to repeated merging of Header Manager)

jmeter.backendlistener.elasticsearch.name: ElasticSearch backend listener
jmeter.backendlistener.elasticsearch.description:
Apache JMeter plugin for sending sample results to an ElasticSearch engine.
  • Simply add a "Backend Listener" and change the implementation
  • Change the listener's configuration
  • To use filters, simply seperate their name by a semicolon. (f1;f2;f3)

2.4.2.changes: Added string conversion to number for ElasticSearch

2.4.3.changes: Fixed class loader problem with JavaFX StringConverter class

2.5.0.changes: Switched to low-level client v6.4 & added custom variables support

2.5.1.changes: Added way of adding all response headers as well as request headers as ElasticSearch Index properties. (Basically JSON key/value pairs)

2.5.3.changes: Fixed error with filters (#2), refactored the method.

2.5.4.changes: Fixed error with filters (#37), refactored the method.

2.6.0.changes: Added AWS support, added RegExp support in filters, fixed bug with header parsing

2.6.1.changes: Fixed bug with header parsing (#40, thanks @ncasaux)

2.6.5.changes: New SSL feature, header parsing fixes, multiple little bug fixes.

2.6.6.changes: Fixed issue with index types ES 7.0+

2.6.7.changes: Fixed breaking issue with getElasticSearchVersion() method

2.6.8.changes: Fixed breaking issue with SSL conflicts

2.6.9.changes: Fixed breaking issue with SSL conflicts

2.6.10.changes: Fixed issue with sending variables through headers (#61)

2.6.11.changes: Fixed issue with deprecated methods resulting in errors and timeout issues

2.7.0.changes: Added an exclude feature for filters

jmeter.pack-listener.name: JMeter Listener pack
jmeter.pack-listener.description:
This JMeter Plugin allows to write load test data on-the-fly to ClickHouse (as well as InfluxDB, ElasticSearch, with additional feature: aggregation of Samplers)
Explanations and usage examples on project wiki.
Dashboards for ClickHouse.

1.7.changes: New ClickHouse table scheme jmresults(buffer)->jmresults_data(ops storage with extended data request/response)->jmresults_statistic(mat view as archive storage). New field (hostname) in stats

jmeter.backendlistener.kafka.name: Kafka backend listener
jmeter.backendlistener.kafka.description:
Apache JMeter plugin for sending sample results to a Kafka server.
  • Simply add a "Backend Listener" and change the implementation
  • Change the listener's configuration
  • To use filters, simply separate their name by a semicolon. (f1;f2;f3)

ulp-jmeter-autocorrelator-plugin.name: UbikLoadPack Auto-correlator plugin
ulp-jmeter-autocorrelator-plugin.description: Plugin which provides the ability to easily load tests Vaadin, Oracle Siebel, Oracle PeopleSoft, Oracle Hyperion and Oracle JD-Edwards EntrepriseOne (JDE Eone) applications with Apache JMeter

ulp-jmeter-videostreaming-plugin.name: UbikLoadPack Video Streaming plugin
ulp-jmeter-videostreaming-plugin.description: Plugin which provides the ability to easily load test servers delivering Adaptive Bitrate Streaming (ABR). It supports the following implementations: Low Latency Mpeg-Dash, Mpeg-Dash, Apple HLS / Low-Latency HLS (LL-HLS), HLS SGAI (Interstitials), Microsoft Smooth (HSS) and Adobe HDS. Both Live and VOD streams are automatically handled. The plugin realistically simulates players and outputs video specific metrics allowing you to analyze User Experience. It supports HTTP 1.1 and HTTP/2. It also allows to simulate CDN behaviour with Video Streams.

10.3.0.changes: Support for EXT-X-MAP tag in HLS and availabilityTimeOffset='INF' in DASH and bug fixes, full release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-10-3-0/

10.2.4.changes: Major release introducing support for HLS SGAI with Interstitials, full release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-10-2/

10.1.1.changes: Major release introducing support for HLS nPVR and audio-only streams, full release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-10-1-1/

10.0.0.changes: Major release introducing support for Ad Insertion and Java Virtual Threads, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-10-0-0/

9.1.6.changes: Enhancements and bug fixes, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-9-1-6

9.1.5.changes: Enhancements and bug fixes, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-9-1-5

9.1.3.changes: Trigger Low Latency Dash based on availabilityTimeComplete tag, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/release-of-ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-9-1/

9.1.2.changes: Introduce CDN Caching simulator, improve reporting, increase accuracy of simulation, bug fixes on DASH and audio streams, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/release-of-ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-9-1/

9.0.1.changes: Add support for HTTP/2, this version now requires JAVA 11 or higher, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/release-of-ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-9-1/

8.0.8.changes: Bugfix version for Show playlist in case of video manifest, fix NPE for Multiperiod DASH VOD

8.0.7.changes: Bugfix version for HLS and Dash subtitles and wrong first chunk download in HLS for certain types of manifest

8.0.6.changes: Bugfix version for HLS and Dash subtitles and wrong first chunk download in HLS for certain types of manifest

8.0.4.changes: Live DASH: Introduce option to follow redirect URL for Manifest Reload

8.0.2.changes: Bugfix version in Installer and HLS non master playlist detection

8.0.0.changes: Introduce support for Apple Low-Latency HLS (LL-HLS), see https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/performance-testing-low-latency-hls-servers/

7.2.8.changes: DASH and SMOTH: use play ahead for LIVE. DASH: add support for Trick mode in VOD Playback. Live Edge : Introduce option to allow following Live Edge on every reload or only at the playing start.

7.2.1.changes: Minor bugfix on test stop and detection of VOD

7.2.0.changes: Added support for Low Latency DASH

7.1.9.changes: Added ability to filter video streams by supported codec. Bugfixes

7.1.8.changes: Performance improvements. Bugfix for distributed testing

7.1.7.changes: VOD: Add the option to resume a video between iterations. VOD: Add option to start video at an offset. Some bugfixes

7.1.6.changes: Custom metrics graphs now use Percentile 95 for response times instead of mean. Improvements in error reporting + bugfixes

7.0.0.changes: Redesigned reporting to have live reporting and reporting per request type. New video metric. DASH : Added support to the Descriptor of the AdaptationSet, Added support for attribute suggestedPresentationDelay

6.6.0.changes: Let user choose the audio and subtitles track by the language/name of the track, handle EXT-X-MEDIA, handle subtitles, improve HTTPS performances, bugfixes

ulp-jmeter-gwt-plugin.name: UbikLoadPack GWT plugin
ulp-jmeter-gwt-plugin.description: Plugin which provides the ability to easily script and performance test GWT based applications. It allows to Record and transform GWTRPC requests to XML, Out of the box transformation of requests from XML back to GWTRPC, On-demand transformation of responses from GWTRPC to XML for optional extraction, On-demand transformation of requests from Java objects back to GWTRPC, On-demand transformation of responses from GWTRPC to Java for optional extraction, Assertion on GWT response to check they are OK, View Results Tree renderer to test XPath extractions of data from GWTRPC responses

jmeter.backendlistener.azure.name: Azure backend listener
jmeter.backendlistener.azure.description: Apache JMeter plugin that enables you to send test results to Azure Application Insights.

0.2.9.changes: Add more logging options for data payloads.

0.2.8.changes: Add new logSampleData option for logging response data.

0.2.7.changes: Add new logResponseData option for logging response data.

0.2.6.changes: Add support for connection string and deprecate Instrumentation Key.

0.2.5.changes: Ability to send arbitrary response headers as metrics.

0.2.3.changes: Ability to add custom properties. Set Operation name to the test name value.

0.2.2.changes: Ability to filter samplers (list and regex)

jmeter-pubsub-sampler.name: GCP pubsub plugin

Jmeter plugin to Publish and Subscribe Messages to GCP PubSub.

  • Add the Publisher/Subscriber sampler to send/read events

jmeter-prometheus.name: Prometheus Listener Plugin
jmeter-prometheus.description: A Jmeter plugin to expose sampled metrics to an endpoint to be scraped by Prometheus.

awsmeter.name: AWS Support
awsmeter.description: AWS Meter is a comprehensive JMeter plugin designed to execute performance tests against AWS services including Kinesis, SQS, SNS, Cognito, and EventBridge. This plugin provides specialized Java samplers for each AWS service, leveraging the AWS SDK for seamless integration and communication.

1.0.0.changes: Publish data records in Kinesis Data Stream and Produce messages in SQS Standard or FIFO queue.

2.0.0.changes: Publish messages in SNS Standard or FIFO topic.

2.1.1.changes: Get AWS session token from the credentials file and SNS Java Sampler Client bug fix.

3.0.0.changes: Add Cognito sampler and bug fix to get aws credentials from JMeter Java Sampler parameters.

4.0.0.changes: Update java, gradle and dependencies versions, and support for Localstack with custom endpoints.

4.1.1.changes: Get AWS credentials from EC2 instance profile and ECS task IAM role.

yongfa365-jmeter-plugins.name: Markdown Table Data-driven Controller|JsonPath Assertion for sort

  • 'JsonPath Assertion' can assert elements sort 'Is Asc' or 'Is Desc' or 'All Match' or 'Any Match' or 'count between a and b'
  • 'Console And Html Report' can gen beautiful html report and console report,It's useful for Jenkins saving log

baolu-csv-data-file-config.name: Baolu-csv-data-file-config
baolu-csv-data-file-config.description:

  • If your request involves database update operation, using this plug-in in the test script can avoid lock waiting and improve the reliability of test results.

ulp-observability-plugin.description: This plugin allows you to monitor your JMeter CLI performance test from your favorite browser without having to start JMeter in GUI mode

vdn-junit-reporter-kpi-from-jmeter-dashb.description: A tool that creates a JUnit XML file with KPI rules from JMeter JMeter Dashboard stats.json and generates a result file in JUnit XML format and other formats : html, csv and json.

vdn-junit-reporter-kpi-compare-jmeter-re.description: This tool read KPI declarations in a file and apply the KPI assertion on 2 JMeter Report CSV files (current and reference) and generates a result file in JUnit XML format and others formats Html, Json and Csv.

1.4.changes: Version 1.4 Change page title, define unique table css class to avoid conflict, update libraries.

vdn-elastic-apm-tool.name: vdn@github - elastic-apm-tool
vdn-elastic-apm-tool.description: Manage the Elastic Application Performance Monitoring (ELASTIC APM) in JMeter script.

2.0.changes: Add button 'MODIFY SCRIPT AND LOAD NEW SCRIPT' and choose only a jmx file not a directory

vdn-har-convertor-jmeter-tool.name: vdn@github - har-convertor-jmeter-tool
vdn-har-convertor-jmeter-tool.description: Convert a HAR file to a JMeter Script and a Record XML file.

3.2.changes: Remove the header Content-length because the length is computed by JMeter when the request is created. POST or PUT could have query string and body with content so add query string to the path. Set Content Encoding to UFT-8 for POST or PUT method and request Content-Type:application/json. Add body data content in record.xml for PUT and PATCH methods. encode value for x-www-form-urlencoded when value contains space, equal, slash or plus characters.

5.0.changes: Add an external csv file with transaction information for JMeter Transaction Controller Name. Add compatibility with HAR generated with LoadRunner Web Recorder Chrome Extension. Correct Filter Include first filter and Filter Exclude second filter

5.1.changes: Compatible with har generated by browsermob-proxy tool.

5.2.changes: Correct extract parameters for mime type 'form-urlencoded' ended with charset likes 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=xxx'

6.0.changes: Add View Result Tree to view the recording xml file

6.1.changes: Correct a NullPointerException when creating the Recording XML file.

7.0.changes: Add manage the websocket connection and messages with 'WebSocket Samplers by Peter Doornbosch', add checkbox for boolean parameter 'ws_with_pdoornbosch' .

7.1.changes: Remove request headers from HTTP/2, these headers start with ':' likes ':authority' or ':scheme', don't create HttpSampler for url 'data:'

8.0.changes: Add new parameter 'remove_headers' remove a list of http headers (comma separator, case insensitive), e.g:'User-Agent,Pragma'

9.1.changes: Add new parameter 'jackson_parser_string_max' to change default Jackson String length size (default integer size 20000000) for processing very large JSON, need jackson libraries>=2.16.1 to avoid conflict with JMeter and Saxon-HE>=12.3 for better performance

10.0.changes: External file could be a JSON file created with 'HAR Transaction Marker' Chrome Plugin or CSV file

1.0.changes: First Version, add Pacing Start Sampler and Pacing Pause Sampler

vdn-otel-apm-tool.name: vdn@github - otel-apm-tool
vdn-otel-apm-tool.description: Manage the integration of OpenTelemetry from Elastic Application Performance Monitoring in a JMeter script.

1.1.0.changes: Added PKCS#8 compatibility and bug fixes

rbourga-jmeter-plugins-apdexcalculator.description: Calculates the Apdex score of Samplers for a given Satisfied Threshold.

1.2.0.changes: Initial release - replaces Apdex & Coefficient of Variation plugin.

1.3.1.changes: Option to specify Apdex rules per transaction.

rbourga-jmeter-plugins-cohendeffectsize.description: Measures the magnitude of the difference between two test results using Cohen's d.

rbourga-jmeter-plugins-modalitycovcheck.description: Checks for multimodality and the level of variation of the test results.

1.2.1.changes: Reduction of false positives by ensuring that the bin size is at least as large as the computed value.

rbourga-jmeter-plugins-tukeyoutlierdetec.description: Detects outliers in the right tail using Tukey's fences and removes them.

1.0.0.changes: Initial release - replaces Right Tail Outlier Detector plugin.

1.2.2.changes: Trimming saved in two separate files: 1. clean results with successful & failed samplers 2. successful samplers only.

jmeter-har-import.name: HAR (HTTP Archive) Import
jmeter-har-import.description: This plugin allows you to import HAR files into JMeter and convert them into HTTP Request Samplers for easier recording.

0.2.0.changes: Several options for configuration added, e.g. en/disabling timers; host exclusion added; grouping of samplers. For more details see: https://github.com/Qytera-Gmbh/JMeterHARImporterPlugin/releases

io.github.vasanthshanmugam-jmeter-auto-c.name: One-Click Auto-Correlation Plugin
io.github.vasanthshanmugam-jmeter-auto-c.description: One-click detection and correlation of dynamic values in JMeter test scripts. Automatically finds session IDs, CSRF tokens, OAuth/Bearer tokens, hidden form fields, ViewState, SAML tokens, and replaces hardcoded values with extractors.

1.0.1.changes: Initial release with correct package namespace (io.github.vasanthshanmugam).

jtl-xls-smart-report.name: JTL Excel Smart Report Generator
jtl-xls-smart-report.description: Generate Excel SLA reports from JTL result files with transaction-wise metrics and P90 SLA validation.

prism.name: Prism - tab-style interface plugin for Apache JMeter
prism.description: A tab-style interface plugin for Apache JMeter

avm-mcp-sampler.name: MCPLoadTester MCP Sampler
avm-mcp-sampler.description: MCP sampler for stdio, HTTP, and HTTP+SSE transports

jmeter-studio-oss.name: JMeter Studio - Theme Engine Plugin for Apache JMeter
jmeter-studio-oss.description: A modern, extensible theme engine for Apache JMeter featuring both dark and light themes with custom icon sets

loadmagic-load-distributor.name: Distributed Load Distributor
loadmagic-load-distributor.description: Automatically distributes thread counts across JMeter generators for distributed testing. Works with JMeter remote testing (-R) via -Ggenerator.hosts, or standalone generators via -Jgenerator.id/-Jgenerator.count. Auto-activates from lib/ext — no test plan element required. Supports Standard ThreadGroup, Ultimate Thread Group, Concurrency Thread Group, and Stepping Thread Group.

1.2.0.changes: JMeter distributed testing support via -Ggenerator.hosts. Auto-detects slave hostname for ID assignment.

1.1.0.changes: Auto-activation via Function SPI — no test plan element required.

1.0.0.changes: Initial release. Requires Config Element in test plan.

llm-metrics-visualizer.name: LLM Metrics Visualizer
llm-metrics-visualizer.description: A JMeter listener plugin for monitoring LLM (Large Language Model) performance metrics in real time. Captures TTFT (Time to First Token), TPOT (Time per Output Token), RPS, input/output tokens per request and per minute, and response time percentiles — grouped by sampler name.

swagger-postman-importer.name: Swagger / Postman Importer
swagger-postman-importer.description: Imports Swagger/OpenAPI 2.0 and 3.0 specs (JSON and YAML) and Postman Collection v2.0/v2.1 files into a JMeter test plan. Supports all body modes (raw, urlencoded, formdata, GraphQL), Bearer, Basic, API Key and OAuth2 auth, nested folders with collection-level auth inheritance, and generates HTTP Header Managers per request.

1.0.changes: Initial release: Swagger/OpenAPI and Postman Collection importer.
